title: High contrast ores
description: Never miss a ore again! Makes diamonds and debris very brightly colored.
body:
**Greatly improves ore visibility**

### Cool, but what does it do?
High contrast ores changes (deepslate) diamond ore and ancient debris to be extremely vibrant colors so that you dont miss any. It also makes those ores emissive so that they arent affected by lighting.

### But why?
Because diamond ores in caves are only a few pixels on the block, which makes them easy to miss. With high contrast ores, they're hard to miss. I made this mostly for myself, but anyone is free to use it.
